name: Titillating Rose
outcome: [AttackerName] keeps her hands over [TargetName]'s as she helps [TargetHimOrHer] squeeze them tight together, the tight vice of warm flesh driving [TargetHimOrHer] to eagerly thrust into its softness, the rose scented air putting pleasure and desire before reason.
miss: [AttackerName] keeps her hands over [TargetName]'s as she helps [TargetHimOrHer] squeeze them tight together, but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to ignore the temptation to thrust!
